response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video to identify two distinct song performances: 'とくべチュ、して' and '天天天天地創造'.
2. Song 1: Title 'とくべチュ、して' identified via on-screen credit (Music: 鏡音乃ち/Lyrics: 鏡音乃ち). Confirmed via search as a song by =LOVE.
3. Song 2: Title '天天天天地創造' identified via on-screen credit (feat. ななひら & PA 専). 
4. Attempted searches for both songs, but found no reliable full text lyrics for either. Set lyrics fields to null.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Kobo Kanaeru and other Hololive Indonesia members during her 3D birthday concert. The songs are 'とくべチュ、して' by =LOVE and '天天天天地創造' by Nanahira & PA-sen.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and fellow VTubers perform 'とくべチュ、して' on a stage with a rainbow and cloud theme. Title and credit text appear on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Moona Hoshinova, Airani Iofifteen, Pavolia Reine, Takanashi Kiara, Kureiji Ollie, Anya Melfissa, Ayunda Risu
